message:
test(bd-3cyi): cover TraceLevel display, log_with_data, span-by-id, and more

Add 12 tests to testing/trace.rs: TraceLevel Display/eq/clone,
log_with_data recording and filtering, end_span_by_id (correct +
nonexistent), log_response_with_duration, unknown correlation ID
fallback, add_metadata, is_leap_year, TraceRetentionConfig derives,
and correlation ID uniqueness (18 → 30 tests).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
